active.text: STYLE LOCK: Period live-action jungle adventure; photoreal animals and humans share one continuous realistic medium—no cartoon stylization. Warm earth and leaf tones by day; moonlit blues at Council Rock; fire as the sole hard orange; wet fog and pearly light on seal beaches; dusty cantonment and mud-camp realism for later tales.

PERFORMANCE LOCK: Objective storybook anthology staging with a framing storyteller voice; default gaze is character-to-character and scene action, not the viewer. Animals speak with full dramatic address to partners while bodies stay species-true. Human village and camp scenes play naturalistically. Brief first-person camp episode places the Narrator on camera among animals who converse among themselves as if overheard.
